title: Middle East on Edge After Trump Says He Delayed Attack on Iran
summary_full: President Trump said he had postponed a “very major attack” against Iran, as Pakistan continued its mediation efforts to end the war.
summary_public: President Trump said he had postponed a “very major attack” against Iran, as Pakistan continued its mediation efforts to end the war.
